hooks.command:
mkdir -p "${CODEBUDDY_PLUGIN_DATA}" && cat > "${CODEBUDDY_PLUGIN_DATA}/config.yaml" <<YAML
qqbot:
  appId: "${CODEBUDDY_PLUGIN_OPTION_appId}"
  clientSecret: "${CODEBUDDY_PLUGIN_OPTION_clientSecret}"
  enabled: true
  name: "My QQ Bot"
  systemPrompt: "You are a helpful assistant."
  dmPolicy: "open"
YAML
